task_completion.description: Log in to the SEB Server at http://localhost:8080.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SEB Server dashboard or interface is visible in the web browser, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Open the 'Engineering Final Exam 2026' configuration for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The configuration editing page specifically for 'Engineering Final Exam 2026' is open in the browser.

task_completion.description: Set the Browser View Mode to 'Window'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown, radio button, or setting for 'Browser View Mode' is selected or set to 'Window'.

task_completion.description: Set the Main Browser Window Width to 1280 and Height to 800.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Input fields for window width and height contain the values '1280' and '800' respectively.

task_completion.description: Append ' SEB_Lab3_Station' to the User Agent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An input field for the User Agent suffix contains ' SEB_Lab3_Station' (with a leading space).
A 'Save' button is clicked, or a success message indicating the configuration has been saved is visible.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the SEB Server web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser navigating the SEB Server UI, not a terminal, API client, or database client.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to mock the configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration changes are made within the actual SEB Server web application, not in a text editor or mock UI.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open to artificially modify the page content.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target configuration is 'Engineering Final Exam 2026'. The expected browser view mode is 'Window' (internal value '1'). The main browser window width must be 1280, and the height must be 800. The user agent suffix must be ' SEB_Lab3_Station' (with a leading space).
